items.id: Selalu siapkan uang tunai kecil untuk warung & parkir di sekitar YIA.
items.en: Always keep small cash for local warungs & parking around YIA.

items.id: Sinyal seluler kuat di area bandara; ratai paket data 30 hari saat tiba.
items.en: Mobile signal is strong near the airport; grab a 30-day data SIM on arrival.

items.id: Kereta Bandara YIA menghubungkan langsung ke Stasiun Tugu Yogyakarta.
items.en: The YIA Airport Train connects directly to Yogyakarta Tugu Station.

items.id: Jam produktif terbaik di cafe lokal: 09.00–11.00 sebelum ramai.
items.en: Best focus hours at local cafes: 9–11 AM before it gets busy.

items.name: Gojek
items.address: Yogyakarta International Airport (YIA), Temon, Kulon Progo

items.name: Grab
items.address: Yogyakarta International Airport (YIA), Temon, Kulon Progo

sim.esimNote_id: eSIM tersedia untuk turis asing — pindai QR di konter bandara atau beli online (Airalo/Holafly) sebelum berangkat. Aktifkan saat tiba agar masa aktif tidak terbuang.
sim.esimNote_en: eSIM is available for foreign tourists — scan a QR at the airport counter or buy online (Airalo/Holafly) before departure. Activate on arrival so validity isn't wasted.

items.name: Telkomsel
items.coverage_id: Sinyal terkuat & merata di Kulon Progo
items.coverage_en: Strongest, most even coverage in Kulon Progo

items.name: by.U
items.coverage_id: Jaringan Telkomsel, harga lebih murah, registrasi via app

items.name: Indosat IM3
items.coverage_id: Stabil di jalur utama, paket turis tersedia
items.coverage_en: Stable on main routes, tourist packs available

preDeparture.en: Buy an eSIM / arrange a roaming plan

onArrival.en: Withdraw cash at the airport ATM
Grab water & snacks for the trip
